title: How a Computer Works
description: Interactive lecture explaining how input, processing, memory, storage, and output work together.

title: Characteristics & Evolution of Computers
description: Interactive lecture on key characteristics of computers and how computers evolved over time.

title: Types of Computers & The Block Diagram
description: Interactive lecture covering types of computers and the basic block diagram of a computer system.

title: Memory & Storage
description: Interactive lecture explaining RAM, ROM, storage devices, files, and why memory matters.

title: Block Diagram of a Computer
description: Input unit, CPU, memory, output unit, control unit, and arithmetic logic unit.

title: Memory and Storage
description: Primary memory, secondary storage, RAM, ROM, hard disk, SSD, and pen drive.

title: Input and Output Devices
description: Keyboard, mouse, scanner, monitor, printer, speakers, and other common devices.

title: Software and Operating Systems
description: System software, application software, and the role of operating systems.

title: Basic Programming Concepts
description: Program, algorithm, flowchart, variables, input, output, and simple logic.

title: Section I Revision
description: Revision of important terms, short questions, diagrams, and exam preparation.
